problem: Why does the immune system attack the body's own tissue in autoimmune disease?
mechanism: Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy
hypothesis: If Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy is applied to in, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 29 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
